to Big Tree Overlook (MP 440) and back.

to Big Tree Overlook (MP 440) and back.

Double Arch Bridge near Nashville is closed for construction to install a permanent pedestrian safety barrier. There is a 7.5 mile detour from MP 437 to MP 440. Visitors can access the Northern Terminus
to Big Tree Overlook (MP 440) and back.

core_details.name: Double Arch Bridge barrier replacement
core_details.description:
Double Arch Bridge near Nashville is closed for construction to install a permanent pedestrian safety barrier. There is a 7.5 mile detour from MP 437 to MP 440. Visitors can access the Northern Terminus
to Big Tree Overlook (MP 440) and back.
